description.en: Public change history for cast-a-doc product scope, planning documents, and release surface.
description.zh-CN: cast-a-doc 产品范围、规划文档和发布界面的公开变更历史。

title.zh-CN: 新增原始图表源码门禁

body.en: Added JSON and HTML validation that rejects Mermaid, PlantUML, Graphviz, and flowchart source when it is published as a code block or visible preformatted fallback. Diagram content must render through the diagram component as SVG.
body.zh-CN: 新增 JSON 与 HTML 校验：拒绝将 Mermaid、PlantUML、Graphviz 和 flowchart 源码作为 code block 或可见 preformatted fallback 发布。图表内容必须通过 diagram 组件渲染为 SVG。

title.zh-CN: 明确 skill 工具契约

body.en: Added `references/tool-entrypoints.md` and rewrote the installable `SKILL.md` around invocation rules, public script tools, maintainer gates, and the boundary between script entrypoints and internal `cast_docs_*` modules.
body.zh-CN: 新增 `references/tool-entrypoints.md`，并围绕调用规则、公开脚本工具、维护门禁，以及脚本入口和内部 `cast_docs_*` 模块的边界重写可安装 `SKILL.md`。

title.en: JSON contract promoted to first tool gate
title.zh-CN: JSON 契约升级为第一道工具门禁

body.en: Added `references/json-contract.md` and updated README, site source, TODO, and verification notes so `validate_doc_json.py` is treated as the first required gate before render and HTML validation.
body.zh-CN: 新增 `references/json-contract.md`，并更新 README、站点源、TODO 和验证说明，让 `validate_doc_json.py` 成为渲染和 HTML 校验前的第一道必要门禁。

body.en: Replaced the 2700-line `scripts/cast_docs_core.py` with a compatibility facade and moved behavior into focused modules for context, inline rendering, SVG sanitization, document validation, project profiles, theme handling, block rendering, diagram rendering, shell composition, HTML profile validation, and CLI helpers.
body.zh-CN: 将 2700 多行的 `scripts/cast_docs_core.py` 改成兼容 facade，并把行为迁移到 context、inline rendering、SVG sanitizer、document validation、project profile、theme、block rendering、diagram rendering、shell composition、HTML profile validation 和 CLI helper 等聚焦模块。

title.zh-CN: 新增 skill bundle 同步门禁

body.en: Synchronized `skills/cast-a-doc/` with the root renderer modules and added `scripts/validate_skill_bundle.py` to CI so the installable Codex skill cannot drift from the repository implementation.
body.zh-CN: 同步 `skills/cast-a-doc/` 与根目录渲染模块，并将 `scripts/validate_skill_bundle.py` 接入 CI，避免可安装的 Codex skill 与仓库实现漂移。

body.en: Extracted shared constants, dataclasses, JSON/config loading, localization, escaping, dotted-value, and repository path helpers into `scripts/cast_docs_common.py` while keeping `cast_docs_core.py` as the compatibility facade.
body.zh-CN: 将共享常量、dataclass、JSON/config 加载、本地化、转义、dotted-value 和仓库路径 helper 抽到 `scripts/cast_docs_common.py`，同时保留 `cast_docs_core.py` 作为兼容 facade。

body.en: Added `pyproject.toml`, `VERSION`, and `RELEASE.md` so releases have package metadata, a version source, and a checklist while existing script entrypoints remain supported.
body.zh-CN: 新增 `pyproject.toml`、`VERSION` 和 `RELEASE.md`，让发布拥有包元数据、版本源和清单，同时继续支持现有脚本入口。

body.en: Moved preview-and-pin guidance ahead of one-line installer shortcuts, documented release tag or commit SHA pinning, and added review-before-execute instructions for `install.sh` without changing installer behavior.
body.zh-CN: 将 preview 加 pin 的说明放到一键安装快捷方式之前，记录 release tag 或 commit SHA pinning，并补充 `install.sh` 先审阅再执行的说明，同时不改变安装器行为。

title.zh-CN: 明确 Schema 与 validator 边界

body.en: Clarified that `schemas/doc.schema.json` owns structural shape while Python validators own semantic, safety, project-profile, rendered-HTML, visual-lint, and fixture-freshness checks; added a lightweight schema contract gate to CI.
body.zh-CN: 明确 `schemas/doc.schema.json` 负责结构形状，Python validator 负责语义、安全、project profile、渲染 HTML、视觉 lint 和 fixture 新鲜度检查；并在 CI 中加入轻量 schema contract gate。

title.zh-CN: 移除 raw SVG 直接透传

body.en: Replaced raw SVG diagram passthrough with a standard-library XML parser and strict SVG tag and attribute allowlist, with unit tests for rejected script, event handler, and external-reference payloads.
body.zh-CN: 将 raw SVG 图表直接透传替换为基于标准库 XML 解析和严格 SVG 标签/属性白名单的 sanitizer，并补充拒绝 script、事件处理器和外部引用载荷的单元测试。

title.en: CI gate added for generated artifacts
title.zh-CN: 新增生成产物 CI 门禁

body.en: Added GitHub Actions validation for project profile, JSON sources, checked-in HTML, visual lint, and rendered fixture freshness across examples, site, plan, and spec.
body.zh-CN: 新增 GitHub Actions 校验 project profile、JSON 源、已提交 HTML、视觉 lint，以及 examples、site、plan、spec 的渲染产物新鲜度。

title.zh-CN: 扩大 fixture 新鲜度检查

body.en: `scripts/check_fixtures.py` now maps site JSON sources to their public root HTML pages and includes the planning and specification workspaces in freshness checks.
body.zh-CN: `scripts/check_fixtures.py` 现在会把 site JSON 源映射到根目录公开 HTML 页面，并把规划和技术方案工作区纳入新鲜度检查。

body.en: Added a homepage navigation section that points to install, README, product plan, technical spec, TODO, CHANGELIST, and examples.
body.zh-CN: 为首页增加导览区，指向安装、README、产品规划、技术方案、TODO、CHANGELIST 和示例。

title.en: README, TODO, and CHANGELIST published as HTML
title.zh-CN: README、TODO 与 CHANGELIST 发布为 HTML

body.en: Added `site/readme.json`, `site/todo.json`, and `site/changelist.json` as agent-readable sources, then generated `readme.html`, `todo.html`, and `changelist.html` for GitHub Pages.
body.zh-CN: 新增 `site/readme.json`、`site/todo.json` 和 `site/changelist.json` 作为 agent 可读源，并生成 `readme.html`、`todo.html` 和 `changelist.html` 发布到 GitHub Pages。

title.zh-CN: 停用 Markdown TODO 与 CHANGELIST

body.en: Removed obsolete root Markdown backlog/history files so the public status source is JSON plus generated HTML.
body.zh-CN: 移除根目录中过时的 Markdown 待办与变更历史文件，让公开状态源统一为 JSON 加生成 HTML。

body.en: Kept the landing H1 as `cast-a-doc` while the topbar breadcrumb reads `CAST-Docs / cast-a-doc / Home` or `CAST-Docs / cast-a-doc / 首页`.
body.zh-CN: 首页 H1 保持为 `cast-a-doc`，同时顶栏面包屑显示为 `CAST-Docs / cast-a-doc / Home` 或 `CAST-Docs / cast-a-doc / 首页`。

body.en: Expanded the architecture spec with artifact evolution, token-saving mechanics, standardization, speed, coding-agent readability, diagrams, and small code examples.
body.zh-CN: 扩展技术方案，补充文件产物演变、省 token 机制、标准化、速度、coding agent 可读性、图表和小型代码示例。

body.en: Added `.cast-docs/project.json` styleProfile guidance so project startup can preserve standardized theme, density, surface, accent, and token override choices without arbitrary CSS.
body.zh-CN: 补充 `.cast-docs/project.json` styleProfile 指引，让项目启动流程能保留标准化主题、密度、表面、强调色和 token 覆盖选择，而不引入任意 CSS。

body.en: Added `plan/` as product planning, `spec/` as technical design, and linked the new workspace from README and the landing page.
body.zh-CN: 新增 `plan/` 作为产品规划、`spec/` 作为技术方案，并从 README 和首页链接到新的工作区。

text.en: The rewrite used guided migration mode: keep working implementation artifacts intact, add explicit planning and specification documents beside them, and modify entry points only to expose the new documentation.
text.zh-CN: 本次重写使用 guided migration 模式：保留可工作的实现产物，在旁边补充显式规划与技术方案文档，并只修改入口以暴露新的文档结构。
